content.text:
This rotated view confirms the connections clearly. Atom **O:14** has exactly **two** covalent bonds:

1. One bond to **C:15** (carbon, index 15)
2. One bond to **C:7** (carbon, index 7)

## Summary

| Neighbour | Atomic Index | Element |
|-----------|-------------|---------|
| 1         | 7           | C       |
| 2         | 15          | C       |

**geomconf_index:** **7529**

Atom O:14 is an ether oxygen (–O–) bridging two carbon atoms (C:7 and C:15), which is consistent with its two single bonds to carbon.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 14, whose element should be O. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
